full_text:
Li Ying 李應
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Ying (李應). Opposed his kinsman Li Jue’s wish to execute his former superior Zhao Wen and won. Li Ying was affiliated with Li Jue.
